title: Sorting & Filtering
subtitle: organize, search, analyze!
overview: This session introduces students to Sorting and Filtering in spreadsheets. Students will learn how to organize data in ascending and descending order, apply filters, and quickly find useful information from tables using Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.

images._note: Add classroom photos, spreadsheet screenshots, sorting activities, and student practice images.

activity.title: Student Marks Sorting & Filtering Activity
steps: Open the spreadsheet containing student marks
Click on Sort A-Z to arrange names alphabetically
Sort marks from Highest to Lowest
Filter only students who scored above 80
Challenge: Find only Grade A students using filter

quiz.q: What is the purpose of Sorting in a spreadsheet?
quiz.explanation: Sorting arranges data in a proper order like A-Z or smallest to largest.
Sort A-Z arranges text alphabetically from A to Z.
Filtering displays only the data matching selected conditions.

quiz.q: Which sorting option arranges numbers from highest to lowest?
quiz.explanation: Descending order arranges numbers from largest to smallest.

quiz.q: Where can you find the Filter option in Excel?
quiz.explanation: The Filter tool is available in the Data tab.

quiz.q: If you want to see only students from Class 6A, what should you use?
quiz.explanation: Filtering helps display only selected category data like Class 6A.

quiz.q: Sorting marks from smallest to largest is called:
quiz.explanation: Ascending order arranges values from small to large.

quiz.q: Which tool helps quickly find students scoring above 90?
quiz.explanation: Filtering allows users to display only scores above a selected value.

quiz.q: What symbol usually appears when Filter is applied?
quiz.explanation: A dropdown arrow appears in column headings after applying Filter.

quiz.q: Which software can be used for Sorting and Filtering?
quiz.explanation: Excel and Google Sheets are spreadsheet software used for sorting and filtering.
Filtering only hides unwanted data temporarily; it does not delete it.

quiz.q: Which option is useful for arranging roll numbers?
quiz.explanation: Sorting helps arrange roll numbers in proper order.

quiz.q: Which feature helps organize messy data quickly?
quiz.explanation: Sorting organizes data neatly and systematically.

quiz.q: What happens when multiple filters are applied?
quiz.explanation: Multiple filters display only rows matching all selected conditions.

options: To organize and analyze data easily
quiz.explanation: Sorting and Filtering help users quickly organize and analyze information.
